title: staff — declared entitlements
description: Six entitlement keys. `staff_slot` + `coach_slot` cap headcount per tenant per tier. `staff_compensation_tracking` is an OPT-IN boolean (off by default even on Enterprise — tenants explicitly enable HR-tier features so we don't accidentally collect regulated_financial data). `staff_org_chart` gates the reports_to hierarchy (Enterprise-only — mid-market tenants don't need reporting chains). `coach_certifications_verified` gates HR-verified certifications for compliance-sensitive tenants (medical, insurance, government contracts). `coach_rating_display` toggles the public rating badge on the tenant website.

entitlements.description: How many active Staff rows a tenant can have. Small: 5 (owner + 4 employees — small gym / studio profile). Medium: 50 (typical academy). Enterprise: unlimited (null cap). Consumed on Staff.creating + on employment_status offboarded → active (rehire). Released on employment_status → offboarded + on soft-delete.
enforcedBy: StaffObserver.deleted (soft-delete) is a no-op on entitlement (release already fired on the transition)

entitlements.description: How many active Coach rows a tenant can have. Small: 1 (owner-coach — the classic single-instructor micro-gym). Medium: 10. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on Coach.creating; released on Coach.status → archived + Coach soft-delete.
enforcedBy: CoachObserver.deleted (soft-delete) is a no-op (release already fired)

entitlements.description: Opt-in gate for the compensation_type / compensation_amount_cents / compensation_currency / pay_frequency columns. OFF BY DEFAULT on every tier — tenants explicitly enable this via the HR settings surface. When off, the columns MUST be NULL; the observer refuses writes. When on, the columns become writable but still require `staff.manage.compensation` permission on every write path (permission is separate from entitlement — the gate says the FEATURE is available; the permission says WHO can use it).
enforcedBy: StaffObserver.creating refuses compensation_* writes when gate is off
StaffObserver.updating refuses compensation_* writes when gate is off
SDUI compensation edit surface hidden when features array does not include 'staff.compensation'
entitlements.compliance_note: This gate exists so tenants that don't track compensation in Stackra (they use an external HRIS) never accidentally have regulated_financial data collected. Turning the gate ON is a compliance-relevant tenant decision — the ops team logs the toggle in the compliance audit trail.

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables the reports_to_staff_id column write path + the /staff/{staff}/direct-reports endpoint + the org-chart visualisation in the SDUI. Small + Medium tenants have flat org structures; the entitlement gates the hierarchy feature entirely.
enforcedBy: StaffObserver.creating refuses reports_to_staff_id writes when gate is off
StaffObserver.updating refuses reports_to_staff_id writes when gate is off
OrgChartResolver returns empty when gate is off
SDUI org-chart surface hidden when features array does not include 'staff.org_chart'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only opt-in. Enables the HR-verified certification workflow: new coach certifications land in `pending_verification` state; HR must upload the signed document (via storage::File) + invoke the verify action; only then does the certification enter `verified` state (surfaced with a badge on the coach's public profile). Compliance-sensitive tenants (medical rehab clinics, government-contract sports academies) enable this; typical tenants don't need it.
enforcedBy: CoachObserver.updating on certifications: when gate is on, new entries default to `pending_verification`
CoachController@verifyCertification refuses when gate is off
SDUI verify-certification button hidden when features array does not include 'coach.certifications_verified'

entitlements.description: Toggles the public rating badge on the tenant's coach directory. When off, coach.rating is still computed by AggregateCoachRatingsJob (for internal HR review) but never rendered on public-facing surfaces. Small tier defaults off because owner-coaches don't self-rate; Medium+ defaults on.
enforcedBy: CoachController@publicShow strips rating from the response envelope when the gate is off
SDUI coach-rating widget hidden when features array does not include 'coach.rating_display'
